summary: Comprehensive testing of CloudTax WS Pilot Dashboard - all backend APIs (32/32 tests passed) and frontend flows verified. Multi-tenant RBAC working correctly for CLIENT/WS_PARTNER/CPA/ADMIN roles.
critical_code_review_comments: Code is well-structured with proper separation of concerns
All interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing
API uses proper RBAC with require_role dependencies
Frontend uses withCredentials for cookies + Bearer token fallback
Warm cream palette (rgb(250,249,247)) and Georgia serif headings implemented correctly
context_for_next_testing_agent: All backend APIs and frontend flows tested and working. Backend test file at /app/backend/tests/test_cloudtax_api.py covers: Health, Auth (login/logout/me/brute-force), RBAC (CPA filtering, WS document access denial, client tier redaction), Engagements CRUD, Documents (list, presigned URLs), Opportunities (create, share, WS view), Time entries, Checklist, Metrics (pilot, economics, utilization), Users (invite, toggle active). Frontend verified: Login page, Admin dashboard with metrics/table/economics/utilization, CPA files list and engagement detail with doc checklist/review checklist, WS dashboard with Pipeline kanban/Opportunities feed/Metrics tabs, Client portal with progress dots/CPA card/documents/CRA access. Design verified: warm cream background rgb(250,249,247), Georgia serif headings.

features_tested.auth_login: PASS - All roles login successfully, returns user + token + httpOnly cookie
features_tested.auth_me: PASS - Bearer token and cookie auth both work
features_tested.auth_logout: PASS - Clears cookie and returns ok:true
features_tested.rbac_cpa_filter: PASS - CPA sees only assigned engagements
features_tested.rbac_ws_documents: PASS - WS partner gets 403 on document access
features_tested.rbac_client_tier: PASS - Client sees tier as null (redacted)
features_tested.engagements_list: PASS - Admin sees all 10 seeded engagements
features_tested.engagements_enriched: PASS - Returns corporation, client, cpa, docs_total, cpa_hours, opps_count
features_tested.engagements_status: PASS - PATCH status logs history and sets date fields
features_tested.documents_upload_url: PASS - Returns presigned S3 PUT URL
features_tested.opportunities_share: PASS - Sharing sets shared_at and creates notification
features_tested.time_entries: PASS - Create and list time entries
features_tested.checklist: PASS - List and toggle checklist items
features_tested.metrics_economics: PASS - Admin only, returns per-tier margin
features_tested.metrics_utilization: PASS - Returns CPA list with hours
features_tested.users_invite: PASS - Creates user and returns invite_link
features_tested.frontend_login: PASS - Login form renders and works
features_tested.frontend_admin: PASS - Dashboard shows metrics, 10 clients, economics, utilization
features_tested.frontend_cpa: PASS - Files list shows assigned engagements, detail shows doc/review checklists
features_tested.frontend_ws: PASS - Pipeline kanban, Opportunities feed, Metrics tabs all work
features_tested.frontend_client: PASS - Portal shows progress, CPA card, documents, CRA access
features_tested.frontend_logout: PASS - Sign out redirects to login

mocked_apis.aws_ses: SES may be in sandbox - invite_link returned in response as fallback
mocked_apis.aws_s3: Presigned URL generation works, actual PUT may fail if bucket CORS not configured
